title: vv-harness features.json
description: Canonical definition of the .harness/features.json envelope and the feature object it contains. This is the single authoritative source for the field list; rules/agent-teams-protocol.md and skills/harness-init/SKILL.md link here instead of restating it. scripts/validate-features.py implements these checks by hand (stdlib only, no jsonschema dependency) so this file documents intent for humans and external tools rather than being loaded at validation time.

project.description: Project name, set once at /harness-init time.

created.description: ISO date the harness was initialized for this project.

total_features.description: Count of entries in features[]. Kept in sync by whoever adds or removes a feature.

passing.description: Count of features with status "passing". Kept in sync alongside total_features.

features.description: The tracked feature list. Each entry is a feature object (see $defs/feature).

id.description: Unique feature id, e.g. F001. Lead assigns at feature-creation time; never reused.

description.description: What the feature is. Once a spec object is attached, editing this string invalidates spec.hash.

priority.description: Lower numbers claim first. Lead sets at creation time.

status.description: Exhaustive enum. See the Feature Schema section of agent-teams-protocol.md for the meaning of each value.

scope.description: Directories and files this feature owns. Used in spawn prompts to define teammate boundaries.

depends_on.description: Feature ids that must reach status "passing" before this one may start.

assigned_to.description: Teammate name when Agent Teams is active, or "single-session"; null otherwise.

test_file.description: Path to the test file proving this feature. Required non-null once status is "passing".

coverage.description: Coverage percentage on touched code. Required non-null once status is "passing".

notes.description: Free-form context: Linear issue id, decisions, anything not captured by other fields.

correction_cycles.description: Operational metric, optional for backward compatibility with pre-v3.3 features.json files. Incremented automatically by verify-task-quality.sh on each TaskCompleted rejection. Never manually set.

scope_expansions.description: Operational metric, optional for backward compatibility. Files/directories added to scope after initial assignment.

approaches_tried.description: Operational metric, optional for backward compatibility. Brief notes on approaches attempted before the passing implementation.

failure_reason.description: Operational metric, optional for backward compatibility. Why the feature reached status "failed".

discovered_via.description: Operational metric, optional for backward compatibility. Id of the feature whose implementation revealed the need for this one.

spec.description: Optional spec-verification record; absent or null means unverified. See schemas/readiness-stamp.md for the canonical hashing recipe.

hash.description: sha256 of the description string exactly as stored.
